rules: 1. Be respectful. No harassment, slurs, doxing, violent speech, or discrimination. No bashing of artists, groups, or individuals. No gatekeeping. No unsolicited idol accountability discussions. Dismissive or hostile language directed at someone (e.g. "stfu", "shut up") is a Rule 1 violation, not Rule 2.

2. No NSFW/disturbing content. No sexual comments, NSFW media, or content that could trigger distress (creepy images, scare gifs, etc.). Rule 2 is specifically for sexual/disturbing content, not general rudeness.
3. No spam or disruptive content. No excessive emojis/caps, copypastas, pasted lyrics, random memes/gifs, or shitposting. Keep media relevant.
4. Avoid sensitive topics (self harm, abuse, etc.).
5. No advertising. No server invites, referral links, or subscription solicitation. DM ads are an instant ban.
6. Keep extended conversations in English.
7. No sharing personal info (photos, private socials, identifiable info).
8. Do not discuss muted/banned members.
9. No fanfics, roleplaying, e-dating, or flirting with members.
10. Do not backseat moderate. Ping Mods or use the report bot instead.
11. No begging (Nitro, gifts, etc.), including via DM.

1. Be respectful. No harassment, slurs, threats, doxxing, or discrimination. Don't escalate conflict; ping mods instead. Dismissive or hostile language directed at someone (e.g. "stfu", "shut up", telling someone off) is a Rule 1 violation, not Rule 2.
2. Keep it appropriate. No NSFW content, sexual remarks, or disturbing/shock content. Rule 2 is specifically for sexual/disturbing content, not general rudeness.
3. No spam or disruption. No emoji floods, random memes/GIFs, copypastas, or begging.
4. Be authentic. No AI-generated misleading content, fanfics, or joking about idol relationships.
5. Protect privacy. Don't share selfies, personal info, or discuss triggering topics.
6. No advertising. No server invites, self-promotion, or referral links. DM-only if someone asks.
7. English only. All chat must be in English.
8. Respect mod decisions. Don't ask about banned/muted users. DM the mod bot if it involves you.
9. Don't backseat moderate. Report violations to mods; don't enforce rules yourself.
